project.name: GEODE
project.description: Source-attested promotion path from a bounded policy mutation to paired tau2 evidence.

nodes.name: Tau2 agent policy
nodes.summary: The sole candidate-owned behavior surface for this campaign.

nodes.name: Tau2 GEODE adapter
nodes.summary: Builds GEODE participants, delegates half-duplex turn control, and persists per-turn pre-execution retry identity.

nodes.name: Tau2 turn supervisor
nodes.summary: Owns the half-duplex deadline, stop mapping, and retry-telemetry projection while AgenticLoop yields after each completed tool batch.

nodes.name: AgenticLoop
nodes.summary: Runs model and tool rounds until termination, with default-off external boundaries and current-run pre-execution retry identity for evaluator attestation.

nodes.name: Tool call processor
nodes.summary: Executes one model response's tool calls and preserves input order while batching eligible calls.

nodes.name: Paired tau2 evaluator
nodes.summary: Derives frozen runner arguments, screens unreachable train arms at zero candidate cost, isolates measurement state, and projects structural failure codes. Reuses identity-proven cached rows across relaunches (hash-bound row cache): full-cache arms synthesize results without spending conversations, partial hits re-run only unfinished tasks, and interrupted runs donate their finalized simulations at harvest.

nodes.name: Hash-bound row cache
nodes.summary: Reuses only semantic tau2 rows whose full measurement identity and row/context payload hashes verify; infrastructure placeholders remain missing work.

nodes.name: Promotion supervisor
nodes.summary: Preflights authority inputs, retains task identity only in its audit request, projects closed feedback to producers, and owns evidence plus the monotone search ref.

nodes.name: Evaluator entrypoint
nodes.summary: Selects the locked runtime and invokes the trusted paired evaluator outside the candidate surface.

nodes.name: Codex KG producer
nodes.summary: Gives GPT-5.4 a bounded one-hop architecture subgraph plus structural closed failure codes, hides supervisor protocol paths, and accepts one general policy edit.

nodes.name: Crucible program
nodes.summary: Centralizes experimentation, constraints, preferences, setup, and the closed dynamic-feedback boundary; only its candidate_program section is model-facing.

nodes.name: Candidate replay producer
nodes.summary: Reapplies one attested candidate after infrastructure invalidation, or after a source-contract-bound evaluator digest change.
